title: MycoSense Sensor Reading (v1)
description: Versioned schema for a single timestamped sensor snapshot from a MycoSense field deployment. Location is stored at coarse resolution (100 m grid) — no precise GPS coordinates.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Increment minor for backwards-compatible additions, major for breaking changes.

sessionId.description: Unique identifier for this data-collection session. Must not contain volunteer names or PII.

timestamp.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when this snapshot was captured.

location.description: Coarse deployment location. Do not store precise GPS coordinates — use a 100 m grid reference or named site only.

siteName.description: Named research site (e.g. 'Pecos Canyon Plot A').

gridRef.description: 100 m grid square reference (e.g. MGRS or OS grid). Not a precise coordinate.

elevationM.description: Approximate elevation above sea level in metres.

calibration.description: Per-electrode baseline offsets captured before the session started.

baselineMv.description: Rolling-mean baseline in millivolts at time of capture.

capturedAt.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the baseline was captured.

unit.description: Unit of the value field. Currently always mV.

timestamp.description: Unix epoch milliseconds for this individual reading.

weather.description: Optional co-located environmental readings from embedded climate sensors.
